name: Mod Organizer 2
purpose: Primary mod management tool, uses virtual filesystem to keep Skyrim directory clean.
installNotes: Install MO2 on the same SSD drive as Skyrim, but NOT inside the Steam or Skyrim game folder.
Recommend creating a folder named 'Skyrim Modding' or 'MO2' at root level (e.g. C:\SkyrimModding\MO2).
Configure MO2 profile with 'Use profile-specific Game INI Files' enabled.

name: LOOT
purpose: Load Order Optimisation Tool. Analyzes plugin files to suggest optimal order and warn about missing patches or dirty edits.
installNotes: Install LOOT and add it to the MO2 executable list.
Always run LOOT through MO2 to ensure it detects the virtual mod layout.

name: SSEEdit (xEdit)
purpose: Advanced conflict detection, editing, cleaning and patch creation utility.
installNotes: Extract the downloaded archive into a folder inside your Modding tools directory (e.g., C:\SkyrimModding\SSEEdit).
Create a copy of SSEEdit.exe and rename it to SSEEditQuickClean.exe to enable auto-cleaning modes in MO2.

name: Wrye Bash
purpose: Generates a 'Bashed Patch' that merges level lists, item edits, and tweak settings across multiple mods.
installNotes: Install as a standalone application and configure its executable pointer in MO2.
Run Wrye Bash via MO2 and build the Bashed Patch, ensuring 'Merge Patches' is disabled if doing manual zMerges.

name: zEdit / zMerge
purpose: Conflict resolution and plugin merging toolkit to bypass Skyrim's 254 active ESP limit.
installNotes: Download the portable version and register zEdit.exe inside MO2.
Use zMerge to merge modular weapon, armor, and simple quest plugins into unified ESPs.

name: DynDOLOD
purpose: Dynamic Distant LOD. Generates high-quality tree and object LODs matching your exact mod list.
installNotes: Requires DynDOLOD Resources SE, DynDOLOD DLL SE, and TexGen to be run first.
Run TexGen through MO2 to generate texture billboards, then run DynDOLOD to bake the final LOD output.

name: Cathedral Assets Optimizer
purpose: Optimizes and formats texture, mesh, animation, and sound files for maximum engine performance.
installNotes: Crucial for optimizing older Skyrim Legendary Edition assets converted to Special Edition format.
Can compile or extract BSA archives safely.

name: Creation Kit SE
purpose: The official editor for Skyrim. Used to resave older ESP files to update their header version to Form 44.
installNotes: Install via Steam under Skyrim Special Edition tools.
Highly recommended to install Creation Kit Platform Extended (fixes memory leaks and crashes) and CK Fixes.
